title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Equitas Small Finance Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Equitas Small Finance Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Equitas Small Finance Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Equitas Small Finance Bank:
Equitas Small Finance Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Equitas Small Finance Bank!
